name: Tropical Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Lightly butter a 9-inch diameter circle on a baking sheet.
3. In a large bowl, stir together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
4. Cut the butter into 1/2-inch cubes and distribute them over the flour mixture.
5. Using a pastry blender or two knives cut in scissors fashion, incorporate the butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
6. In a small bowl, stir together the milk, egg, and vanilla extract.
7. Add the milk mixture to the flour mixture and stir to combine.
8. Stir in the papaya, pineapple, macadamia nuts, coconut, and white chocolate until evenly distributed.
9. With lightly floured hands, pat the dough into an 8-inch circle on the prepared baking sheet.
10. Using a serrated knife, cut into 8 wedges.
11. Bake for 18-20 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned and a cake tester or toothpick inserted into the center of a scone comes out clean.
12. Remove the baking sheet to a wire rack and cool for 5 minutes.
13. Using a spatula, transfer the scones to a wire rack to cool.
14. Recut into wedges if necessary.
15. Serve warm, or let cool completely and store in an airtight container. These freeze well.
